Configuration

Configure Kairo to work with your preferred AI providers and customize its behavior.

Quick Reference

KeyDescriptionTypeDefault
providerThe AI provider to use for chat and commands.stringopenai
modelThe specific AI model to use.stringgpt-4o
api_keyYour API key for the configured provider.string (secret)—
temperatureResponse creativity (0 = deterministic, 2 = very creative).number0.7
max_tokensMaximum tokens in the AI response.number4096
themeTerminal UI theme.stringdark
editorDefault editor for file operations.string$EDITOR
KAIRO_API_KEYEnvironment variable for API key (overrides config).env—
KAIRO_PROVIDEREnvironment variable for provider selection.env—

Configuration Commands

View all config

$ kairo config list

Display all current configuration values.

Set a value

$ kairo config set provider anthropic

Set a configuration key to a new value.

Get a value

$ kairo config get model

Display the value of a specific configuration key.

Use environment variables

$ export KAIRO_API_KEY=sk-...

Override config values with environment variables.

Environment Variables

You can configure Kairo using environment variables. These take precedence over config file values.

.env example
KAIRO_API_KEY=sk-your-api-key
KAIRO_PROVIDER=anthropic
KAIRO_MODEL=claude-sonnet-4
KAIRO_TEMPERATURE=0.3
Kairo

Your AI teammate in the terminal.
